parsed.production_notes: The video is a standard selfie-style recording shot on a smartphone. Lighting, movements, and facial expressions are natural with no AI artifacts.

characters.appearance: Young male, approximately 20 years old, medium build, light brown complexion. He has short, curly dark hair, a small mustache, and a goatee. He wears small stud earrings.
characters.wardrobe: Black zip-up jacket over a white t-shirt, accessorized with a silver chain necklace.

scenes.setting: Inside a car during the daytime. Black leather seats are visible in the background.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A sits in the driver's seat of a car, framed from the chest up. The car interior features black leather seats. Natural daylight illuminates the scene from the windows. Character A looks directly at the camera, speaking and occasionally gesturing with his hands.

scenes.visual_description: A single, continuous close-up shot of Character A in a car speaking directly to the camera. Dynamic text overlays appear throughout the video, translating his Spanish and emphasizing key English phrases.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: I'm tired of being a no sabo.
Character A says: Hola, me llamo Lucas Reyes. [Hello, my name is Lucas Reyes.]
Character A says: Tengo 20 años [I am 20 years old]
Character A says: y voy a hablar español todos los días hasta ser fluido. [and I am going to speak Spanish every day until I am fluent.]
Character A says: I'm giving myself one year or less to become fluent in Spanish.
Character A says: And if you're also learning Spanish, or if you're also a no sabo,
Character A says: I got you. We gon' learn together.
Character A says: I'm focusing purely on practicality. We ain't doing no textbooks, we ain't doing none of that.
Character A says: I also ain't waiting until January 1st. We starting this goal now.
Character A says: So if you learning Spanish,
Character A says: hit that follow button. Let's learn Spanish together.
